title: PATIKIL 13x9" Fast Food Tray, Plastic Reusable Recyclable Multi-Purpose Rectangle Serving Tray for Restaurant Home Kitchen, Black
features: The plastic fast food tray is usually used to hold food, sides, utensils, and drinks all on one tray in dining areas and self-service restaurants, making it effortless to carry all foods from check-out lines to tables.
Material: Plastic; Color: Black; Total Size: 34 x 24 x 2 cm / 13.39 x 9.45 x 0.79 inch(L*W*H); Inner Depth: 1.5cm / 0.59 inch; Package List: 1 x Plastic Tray
Advantage: Made of plastic material, Reusable Recyclable, lightweight and durable, it has good load-bearing capacity and can hold most food on one tray.
Instruction: Fashion texture surface make it look great in your restaurant or home, modern and elegant, besides, and the raised base allows you to hold the tray more comfortably.
NOTE: Please choose the right size according to you.
